objective: Implement the macOS runtime ports: single instance, activation, power lease, dual clocks and sleep/wake observation.
deliverables: Kernel-backed single-writer lock with fail-closed behavior on unlockable filesystems.
Reference-counted power activity released on success, failure, cancellation and throw.
Elapsed/active clock ports proven by sleep-semantics contract tests and sleep/wake reconcile triggers.

verification.expectedEvidence: Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-JOB-008-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-NFR-001-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-NFR-001-02 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-NFR-001-03 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-NFR-001-04 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.

verification.method: macOS runtime Port contract suite (instance, activation, power, clocks, sleep/wake).
verification.expectedEvidence: Every Port case passes: exactly one writer, activation without lock takeover, reference-counted power release on all terminal paths, sleep-aware clock semantics proven by contract tests, and sleep/wake triggers journal plus reconcile.

stopConditions: A second instance can reach HDC or write Session state.
A clock port cannot prove its sleep semantics by contract test.
